content.en:
"Right here, divide the 800,000 extra-dimensional realms among our human race, and then remove all the creatures of those extra-dimensional realms. "

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

These Eighth Realms responded one after another.

For them, it's all about saving their lives now.

They only felt very unlucky, in their opinion, Ye Tian had cultivated the dimensional domain body, and the dimensional domain body inheritance was not something that ordinary forces could have, Ye Tian must have come from a powerful force, but he had to look at their place.

Subsequently.

These forces immediately signed an agreement with Ye Tian, and then the order was issued, and they began to empty the designated 800,000 extradimensional realms, and move out the living beings inside, all of which were given to the human race.

This is not something to be done in a short period of time, after all, there are many people from other forces in those extradimensional realms, as well as ~ and outsiders.

But.

Ye Tian doesn't worry about this matter, these things should be worried about by these four forces.

After a while, these Fourth Realm generals - everything was taken care of.

After that, Ye Tian let go of the four Eighth Realms and the forces behind them, and then began to move the extradimensional realms of the human race.

In the following days, Ye Tian brought a large number of Terran extra-dimensional realms over and placed them in one super-dimensional realm after another.

At the same time, it also brought some ordinary extradimensional realms.

800,000 extra-dimensional realms, this number is quite a lot, the human race extra-dimensional realms are scattered, and each extra-dimensional realm can obtain a large number of territories.

In the days to come, the human race will be able to thrive and cultivate quickly here in the Upper Domain, and the cultivation environment here will be many times better than that of the Four Thousand Territory.

And with Ye Tian sitting here, other forces don't dare to have any thoughts about the human race.

However, apart from him, the strength of the other people of the human race is indeed too weak, and they are not qualified to walk in the Upper Domain at all.

So, the Terrans now need to hibernate in the Upper Realms.

For this reason, Ye Tian also had to cultivate his relatives and cultivate them to the seventh realm.

......

The thirteenth dimension.

Yuanxu Sea.

This place has been transformed by Ye Tian, and the dimensional channel connecting the human race has been opened.

Ye Tian took Ye Xingchen to a magnificent palace in the depths of the Yuanxu Sea, where the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone was placed.

Ye Xingchen had already comprehended the dimensional rules under Ye Tian's cultivation, and now that he could comprehend the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone, he could quickly improve the dimensional rules.

It was the first time Ye Xingchen had seen the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone, and he was shocked when he took a moment here.

"Father, what kind of treasure is this?"

Ye Xingchen was shocked.

"This is the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone. Ye Tian introduced: "You can use it to comprehend the rules of the dimension, and it will be very easy to comprehend the rules of the nineteen dimensions, but there will be a bottleneck in the rules of the sixth realm comprehension dimension, if you encounter a bottleneck, if you want to continue to break through, unless you create your own six realms of supreme mastery, or some treasures that can break the bottleneck of the rule chain, there is no way to break the limit, you can only forcibly impact the seventh realm." "

"Self-created Six Realms Supreme Peerless !!"

Ye Xingchen also knew that this was extremely difficult, but he also wanted to try it.

Moreover, his father is Ye Tian, Ye Tian can give him a lot of Six Realms Supreme Peerless Inheritance for him to learn from, and there are many resources and treasures, he still has hope.

After another period of time, Ye Xingyue and his wife Xiao Yue also comprehended the rules of the dimension, and Ye Tian also asked them to come to Yuanxu Sea to comprehend the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone.

In the days that followed.

Ye Tian kept a lot of low profile, and kept staying in the 2,300 multidimensional territory and the Yuanxu Sea, occasionally exploring the fifteenth and sixteenth dimensions.

However, many places in the sixteenth dimension are forbidden areas, and they cannot be approached at all, and once they get close, they will be obliterated, and if they get close to some multi-dimensional stars, they will even be strangled by the power of multi-dimensional stars.

Therefore, even if he can enter the sixteenth dimension, he doesn't explore much and can't get too many benefits, he still likes to explore the fifteenth dimension void, where there are a lot of resources.

Time flies.

The Terrans entered the Upper Domain, developed rapidly, and the number of the Sixth Realm increased rapidly, and the population in the Upper Domain also multiplied rapidly.

Of course.

If there were no large number of seventh realms, and the Terrans only relied on Ye Tian himself to defend them, the other forces would not look down on the Terrans.

Maybe many forces are waiting for Ye Tian to fall, and the human race will be vulnerable.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already created a lot of Eight Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sects and a Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Sect, and his soul will had also grown a lot.

In addition, he has also improved the Supreme Dimensional Domain a lot, and his body strength is much stronger than in the past.

However, his cultivation was still in the early stage of the Eighth Realm, and it was not so easy to improve, even if he had sufficient resources, it would take a lot of years.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created the Sixteenth Dimensional Will Peerless Technique, and his strength undoubtedly skyrocketed.

However, he still hasn't created the Eight Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, so he can't be called invincible in the Eighth Realm.

"Father, I'm stuck in a bottleneck!"

Ye Xingchen came to Ye Tian and said.

"How many dimensional rules have you comprehended?" Ye Tian asked.

"Seventeen dimensional rules!" Ye Xingchen said truthfully.

Ye Tian frowned, this potential is not good, he only comprehended the seventeen-fold dimensional rules and fell into a bottleneck, when he could comprehend the twenty-dimensional rules, he fell into the bottleneck of the rule chain!

"Now I give you two choices, one is to hit the seventh realm now, and I will give you enough resources to ensure that you almost 100% break through to the seventh realm. The second option is to create your own Six Realms Supreme Learning, and then break the bottleneck of your own rule chain, so as to continue to comprehend the rules of the dimension, until you comprehend the rules of the thirty-six dimensions. Ye Tian said.

Ye Xingchen did not hesitate at all, and said, "Father, I chose to create my own Six Realms Supreme Peerless Learning. "

He knew very well that if he didn't comprehend the Six Realms Supreme Realm, he would only be reduced to an ordinary seventh realm in the future, and there would be no hope for the ninth realm.

Therefore, he had to create his own Six Realms Supreme Learning.

"Very good, then you go and work hard, I will give you enough help!" Ye Tian said.

In the days that followed, Ye Xingchen was trying to create the Six Realms Supreme Peerless Sect, in which it was easy to get injured, but Ye Tian gave him a lot of healing things to help him recover from his injuries.

And Ye Tian himself was trying to comprehend the rules of the supreme dimension.

He felt that it would not be long before he could comprehend the true supreme dimensional rules.
